reasoning: Multi-layered CBC padding oracle with a genuinely clever ETag-based side channel (rolling window every 10 requests) and custom XOR-0x42 padding scheme that defeats off-the-shelf tools. However, the PoW is trivially bypassable since the client supplies both challenge and nonce (no server-issued challenge), crypto_utils.py is unused/redundant with standard PKCS#7 unpad, and app.py appears truncated. Consistent with the ~7/10 tier of previous SAGE-evaluated CBC padding oracle challenges — real depth in the oracle design but undermined by the broken PoW gate.
